name: get_available_apps
description: List all AI-ready components (apps) available in the Moqui instance.

name: render_component
description: Renders a Quasar/Vue component in the MCE2 user interface canvas.

targetId.description: The CSS ID of the target container (default: mce-canvas)

componentJson.description: The reactive JSON blueprint of the component to render.

mcpToken.description: The security token for the WebMCP session.
